home.hero_title: The Gold Standard of Organic Spices.
home.hero_desc: Bridging the gap between artisanal Indian farmers and global markets. We supply premium, ethically sourced spices, teas, and dry fruits to industries across the world.

values.quality_desc: Every batch undergoes rigorous quality testing to meet international food safety standards.
values.supply_desc: Consistent inventory management ensures your business never runs out of essential ingredients.
values.custom_desc: Tailored spice mixes and tea blends developed by our experts for your unique brand requirements.

wholesale.title: Partner with the source.
wholesale.subtitle: Bulk Orders & Export
wholesale.description: We handle the end-to-end export process, documentation, and quality assurance. Fill out our tiered inquiry form for custom wholesale pricing.

benefits.logistics_desc: Customs-cleared shipping to over 40 global ports.

form.name: Your Name
form.success_msg: Thank you for your interest. Our manager will contact you within 24 hours.

catalog.header_desc: Explore our curated selection of premium spices, teas, and dry fruits. Sourced directly from local farmers and processed with artisanal care.
catalog.no_products_desc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.
catalog.bulk_card_desc: Unlock exclusive wholesale rates for orders above 500kg.

logistics.optimize_msg: Your order fills {{percent}}% of a standard 20ft container. Adding {{remaining}}kg more will optimize your shipping-per-kg cost.
logistics.congrats_msg: Congratulations! You have optimized your shipment for a Full Container Load (FCL). Best freight rates will apply.
